author: jih2nn
content:
[FOCIL breakout #38](https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2146) <t:1784638800:R>! We can discuss:

- Client development
- Spec changes

We can discuss [engine APIs](https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/609) and more. See you soon!

author: potuz
content: I second point 2 here. I think it makes for a safer more resilient protocol to only enforce ILs when the finalized checkpoint is from the previous epoch.

author: nc1234
content: <@845691100072509460> Sorry I missed the breakout (too early for me). Watched the recording and looks like you are in the process of revamping the store. Feel free to close any of my PRs and keep anything that's useful
